name: Compatibility Report
description: Report hardware compatibility results for Samaris OS Mountain Lake Alpha One
title: "[COMPAT] Hardware model — Result (e.g. Dell XPS 13 — Works with issues)"
labels: ["compatibility", "hardware"]
body: |

  ## Your Hardware
  **Device model:** (e.g. Dell XPS 13 9310)
  **CPU:** (e.g. Intel i7-1165G7)
  **GPU:** (e.g. Intel Iris Xe)
  **RAM:** (e.g. 16 GB)
  **Storage:** (e.g. NVMe 512 GB)
  **Wi-Fi chipset:**
  **Ethernet chipset:**
  **Audio device:**

  ## Boot Method
  - [ ] USB key
  - [ ] ISO boot via VM
  - [ ] Real hardware boot
  - [ ] Other:

  ## VM Details (if applicable)
  - VM software:
  - Host OS:
  - RAM allocated:
  - CPU cores:
  - Graphics: (e.g. 3D acceleration enabled)

  ## Results

  | Component | Status | Notes |
  |---|---|---|
  | GRUB boot | ✅/⚠️/❌ | |
  | Plymouth transition | ✅/⚠️/❌ | |
  | Desktop launch | ✅/⚠️/❌ | |
  | Keyboard input | ✅/⚠️/❌ | |
  | Mouse input | ✅/⚠️/❌ | |
  | Wi-Fi | ✅/⚠️/❌ | |
  | Bluetooth | ✅/⚠️/❌ | |
  | GPU acceleration | ✅/⚠️/❌ | |
  | Audio | ✅/⚠️/❌ | |
  | USB devices | ✅/⚠️/❌ | |
  | Ethernet | ✅/⚠️/❌ | |
  | Multi-monitor | ✅/⚠️/❌ | |

  ## Observations
  Describe boot time, any errors, quirks, workarounds used.

  ## Logs
  Attach any relevant dmesg, boot logs, or screenshots.

  ---
  *Report sent via contact.samaris.os@gmail.com*
